Series B Funding Term Sheet

This Term Sheet outlines the proposed terms for the Series B funding round for Quantum Innovations Pte. Ltd. (UEN: T12Q3456X), located at 789 Tech Avenue, #12-34, Singapore 567890.

1. Investor: Venture Growth Partners, represented by Dr. Emily Tan (NRIC: S2345678D).
2. Investment Amount: SGD 5,000,000 for 15% equity in Quantum Innovations Pte. Ltd.
3. Valuation: Pre-money valuation of SGD 30,000,000.
4. Closing Date: Expected to be on or before 15th December 2023.
5. Board Representation: Investor to nominate one board member.
6. Contact Information: Dr. Emily Tan, +65 9123 4567, emily.tan@venturegrowth.sg.
7. Use of Proceeds: Expansion of R&D capabilities and market entry into Southeast Asia.

This Term Sheet is non-binding and intended for discussion purposes only.
